title: Information Technology Manager
description:
• Work as Project Manager in the field of IT Application development, maintenance, delivery and IT infrastructure setup.
  • Apply both classic (waterfall) and Agile (Scrum) methodologies in project execution.
  • Plan technical deliverables (including new system onboarding, any system enhancements and upgrades) to meet project’s requirements within allocated budget and schedule.
  • Plan & collaborate across different application teams to manage technical dependencies of the solution
  • Plan, monitor and manage risks/issues related to technical delivery
  • Provide status update related to technical delivery to Project Manager (PM)
  • Partner with System Analysts and Business Solution Specialist to collate, understand and finalize functional and technical requirements
  • Partner with Architects and Development Lead to ensure solution design complies with enterprise design principles, security and control standards
  • Partner with Development Manager in managing application teams to build the enhancements
  • Partner with Test Manager to ensure completion of System Integration Testing (SIT), User Acceptance Testing (UAT), performance / load testing and application security testing with quality results
  • Manage technical implementation plan across application teams - coordinate technical implementation activities across application teams to ensure non-event production cutover and adequate post implementation support
  • Escalate issues that impacts project schedule on timely basis and propose workarounds/resolutions
  • Understand user/stakeholder requirements and formulate technical design documents.
  • Co-ordinate with vendor on specifications, delivery testing, and implementation.
  • Implementation of middle and back-office systems for Group Global Markets.
  • Manage end to end testing for users with vendor to internal UOB systems.
  • Work with internal Change Control Management for deployment of changes.
  • Work with internal infrastructure and security teams on implementations.

Job Requirements:

  • Master’s degree in computer science or related field.
  • More than 10 years working experience, with at least 8 years in software management, business analysis, system analysis, Technology / Infra upgrade and project/change implementation experience in the financial industry, direct exposure in Market Data platform, Cloud platform and Voice Recording / Playback systems.
  • Strong technical knowledge and/or platform knowledge in Market Data platform and applications such as Voice Recording / Playback Systems, Post trade system, Gold Inventory system, Refinitiv applications and Cloud platforms.
  • Experience in Analysing & Implementing Global Market Application across entity.
  • Experience in Technology / Infrastructure upgrade & Data Centre Migration.
  • Experience in cloud services such as AWS or Azure.
  • Experience in end-to-end system implementation from pre-project to Go-Live.
  • Working knowledge in RFPs with end-to-end project implementation experience.
  • More than 10 years track record in developing and delivering global/regional IT capabilities for a multi-national/regional company with annual budgetary responsibility
  • More than 8 years’ leadership experience in managing IT delivery teams
  • Experience in communicating with technical stakeholders
  • Experience in working with security, network, infra provisioning & architect teams.
  • Experience in upgrading/migrating end of life platform to the latest technology platform.
  • Experience in implementing large-scale, highly available applications or other large project implementation
  • Experience in Agile and hybrid methodologies for iterative development and continuous improvement.
  • Strong technical development background, experience in software development life cycle & documentation.
  • Experience in service-oriented technologies
  • Experience in setting up applications in newly provisioned infra (e.g. OS, network, storage, agents, database, aldon, control M, monitoring tools etc.)
  • Experience in setting up of connections to the other Interface Systems, batch processing, IBM MQ.
  • Proven result-oriented person with a focus on delivery
  • Experience in actual systems development work, with prior coding, functional specifications and technical specifications and systems development and testing experience (in aggregate no less than 8 years)
  • Good understanding and experience in software development cycle
  • Highly effective communicating with technical stakeholders, proficient communicating with non-technical stakeholders
  • Migration of environment including restoration and masking of data.
  • Good problem solving, analytical, synthesis, system thinking and solutioning skills
  • Hands-on working experience in MS access, Excel, Excel Macros, MS SQL Server, Oracle, Windows, Linux, Shell Scripting, Messaging Queue, DevOps tools.
  • Experience in tools like Aldon, Control M, Jira, Remedy, Jenkins, Github.
  • Experience in IT Infrastructure Upgrades.
  • Experience in Cloud and SAAS Implementation.

postedCompany.description:
D L Resources Pte Ltd, established on 5 January 1996, is a Singapore-based Information Technology and Human Capital Services provider. We specialize in delivering end-to-end IT professional services and agency-employed contract staffing solutions to a diverse client base, including leading banks, financial institutions, and multinational corporations.


EA License No: 24C2333


Add us on our recruitment team linkedin profile: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dlresourcesrecruitment/
